hiringCompanies.title: Hiring companies unavailable
hiringCompanies.detail: This foundation route proves SysAdmin platform fallback and metadata before company CRUD ships.

masterData.listDetail: Frontend foundation for platform master-data list states. API-backed data is intentionally outside this slice.
masterData.detailCopy: Frontend foundation for platform master-data detail states and return behavior.
masterData.editCopy: Frontend foundation for edit success, cancel, error, and stale-state behavior.
masterData.companySubscriptionCopy: Company-owned subscription administration with separate platform subscription mutation readiness.

users.listCopy: Platform-scoped user management foundation. Org invites and team membership stay in R4 team routes.
users.createCopy: Platform user creation foundation with deterministic saving, success, cancel, error, and permission states.
users.detailCopy: Read-only platform user detail foundation with list return behavior.
users.editCopy: Platform user edit foundation with deterministic cancel and success targets.

favoriteRequests.listCopy: Platform-admin queue foundation, separate from org favorite request task flows.
favoriteRequests.detailCopy: Platform favorite-request detail foundation with deterministic action readiness.

taxonomy.sectorListCopy: Platform taxonomy foundation for sector list states.
taxonomy.sectorDetailCopy: Sector detail foundation with return to sector list.
taxonomy.subsectorListCopy: Nested subsector list foundation with return to sector detail.
taxonomy.subsectorDetailCopy: Subsector detail foundation with deterministic fallback parent.
